hooks.prompt: You just finished responding. CHECK: Did you make any significant changes this turn (code edits, git operations, CRM updates, config changes, decisions, or task completions)? If YES — you MUST save progress NOW by running execute_sql to INSERT or UPDATE dev_tasks with what was done, files changed, and what is PENDING. If NO significant changes (just reading, answering questions, or minor exploration) — respond with {"decision": "no_save_needed"}. NEVER skip saving after significant work. Antonio should NEVER have to remind you.

CRITICAL: Context compaction is about to happen. You MUST save all current work to Supabase NOW before context is lost. Run execute_sql to INSERT or UPDATE dev_tasks with: (1) what was done this session, (2) current state of any in-progress work, (3) files changed, (4) commits made, (5) what is PENDING. Also update session-context via sysdoc_update if any system-level state changed. This is your LAST CHANCE to save before context is compressed.

Session starting. Follow CLAUDE.md Session Start protocol: (1) sysdoc_read('session-context'), (2) query dev_tasks for BOTH pending work (status in_progress/todo) AND recently completed (status done, ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 3) so you know what was JUST done, (3) git status + recent commits. Present: 'Ultimo lavoro completato' + 'In sospeso' + 'Prossimi passi' (from progress_log PENDING of most recent task). Then ask 'Su cosa lavoriamo?'
